question: Can Org A and Org B complete every required Mainnet validation if they each receive only 0.1 USDC?

configSource.phase13Commands: three normal slots; kill PAYDAY; run one rescue

controlledPhase13WouldFitInPointOne.note: Controlled path only assumes exactly two missed slots at rescue time.

whyNotEveryRequiredValidation: MAX_REPLAY_SLOTS=12 means one rescue can require 0.12 USDC from Org B, which exceeds 0.1.
Chaos/restart validation can create an additional unpaid batch beyond the first rescue.
IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN cutover checklist requires Org A 5 USDC and Org B 2 USDC buffer for safe mainnet ops.
